Title: Vintage Photography Style Drinkware Mockup
Description:
Capture a nostalgic and artistic vibe with this unique mug design. Featuring a compilation of vintage photography elements—including a classic liquor bottle, delicate porcelain, and a stylized bird image—this print creates a visually rich centerpiece.

Perfect for collectors, art enthusiasts, or anyone who appreciates retro aesthetics and timeless photography.

Product Highlights:

  • Unique Artistic Print: Showcases a curated arrangement of vintage-inspired motifs.
  • High-Quality Print: The image is printed directly onto durable, premium ceramic material.
  • Ideal Gift: Makes a thoughtful and distinctive gift for photography lovers, home decor enthusiasts, or cocktail connoisseurs.

Material & Care: This mug is designed for daily use, offering a comfortable grip and lasting appearance. It is microwave and dishwasher safe, making cleanup simple.
